metadata.description: Agents are great at starting; Cairn makes them great at finishing. Git-carried project state — ticket DAGs, data contracts, decisions — so any session, tool, or teammate continues work instead of restarting it. Includes the full conductor loop: worktree-isolated subagents, atomic merges.

plugins.name: cairn
